# bytebase_workspace (Resource)

The workspace resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `license` (String, Sensitive) The license key for the workspace. Upload to activate a subscription plan.
- `logo` (String) The branding logo as a data URI (e.g. data:image/png;base64,...).
- `title` (String) The workspace title.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) The workspace full name in workspaces/{id} format.
- `subscription` (List of Object) The current subscription of the workspace. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscription))

<a id="nestedatt--subscription"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscription`

Read-Only:

- `expires_time` (String)
- `instances` (Number)
- `plan` (String)
- `seats` (Number)
- `trialing` (Boolean)
